title: Windows service remote code execution
description: A remote attacker can exploit improper input validation in a Windows network service to execute arbitrary code with system privileges.

title: Linux kernel privilege escalation
description: A local authenticated attacker can trigger a race condition in a Linux kernel driver and gain elevated privileges.

title: SQL injection in web portal
description: The application fails to sanitize parameters in a login endpoint, allowing SQL injection and unauthorized database access.

title: Cross-site scripting in dashboard
description: Stored cross-site scripting allows an attacker to inject malicious JavaScript into an administrative dashboard viewed by privileged users.

title: Android bluetooth information leak
description: A nearby attacker may abuse Bluetooth pairing logic on Android devices to read sensitive device information.

title: Cloud storage misconfiguration exposure
description: Improper access control in cloud object storage permits unauthenticated users to list and download private files.

title: Command and Scripting Interpreter
description: Adversaries may abuse command and scripting interpreters to execute commands, scripts, or binaries for malicious objectives.

title: OS Credential Dumping
description: Adversaries may attempt to dump credentials from operating system memory, registries, or files to obtain account passwords and hashes.

title: Remote Services
description: Adversaries may use valid accounts to log into remote services such as RDP, SSH, or SMB to move laterally across systems.

title: Phishing
description: Adversaries may send phishing messages with malicious links or attachments to gain initial access to a victim environment.

title: Container escape vulnerability
description: A malicious container image can exploit weak namespace isolation and escape to the host operating system.

title: SSH brute-force detection bypass
description: Improper rate-limit enforcement allows repeated SSH authentication attempts without triggering account lockout controls.
